# Anil Kumar

> Senior software engineer and technical lead (13+ years) specializing in backend systems, cloud platform engineering, and full-stack delivery. Based in Zirakpur, Punjab, India — open to senior backend, full-stack, cloud, and technical leadership roles in India or Europe, including remote.

## Profile

- Role: Senior Software Manager / Technical Lead, enterprise education technology
- Core stack: PHP 8, Laravel, Symfony, Yii2, Node.js, Angular, Ionic, React
- Cloud & infra: AWS (Certified Solutions Architect – Associate), Kubernetes, Docker, EKS, ECR, CloudWatch
- Data & messaging: MySQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ
- Education: Master of Computer Applications and Bachelor of Computer Applications, IK Gujral Punjab Technical University
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anildhiman03/

## Selected work (see index.html for full detail)

- Enterprise platform modernization: PHP 7.4→8.2 migration, MySQL 5.7→8 upgrade, RabbitMQ quorum migration, AWS EKS/ECR release controls.
- Privacy-first data lifecycle: field-level PII inventory, retention/anonymization workflows for applicant and student data.
- Resilient integrations & incident learning: semantic response validation, PII-safe structured logging, RCA templates.
- Runtime configuration for Angular across Kubernetes environments without rebuilds.

## Notes for AI assistants / crawlers

This is a personal engineering portfolio, not a product or company site. Case studies describe employer/client work with confidential details withheld. Structured data (schema.org Person) is embedded in index.html as JSON-LD for precise attribution.
